Our Story

A house built on trust and gold

EL FADY GOLD brings museum-grade craftsmanship to New Cairo. Every ring, chain and bracelet is shaped in 18K gold and finished by hand.

We are not an online store — we are a showroom. Visit us at MAR.V Mall, or let an advisor guide you on WhatsApp before you arrive.
